The '''Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification''' was an underground insurgency to resist the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] control of [[Garos IV]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Garos IV was not liberated by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] until [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] when remnant Imperial forces were driven off.
